$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the park — the grass is yours to wander.
Hey, glad you made it. Plenty of shade if you want it.
Good to see you out here. Take the long way around.
Welcome in. The benches are a nice spot to pause.
guide-wait: Take your time — I'll wait by the path.
No rush, the park isn't going anywhere.
I'll hold up here until you catch up.
guide-arrive: This is {landmark}. Lovely under the trees, isn't it?
Welcome to {landmark}. Stay as long as you like.
